steps.name: Phase 0: Dependency Analysis
steps.description: Analyze contracts to create dependency list and review priority
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/properties-phase-0.md. Run exclusively the properties-phase-0 agent using the Task tool. This phase will analyze all contracts, create a dependency list showing function calls and storage slot access, and generate a review priority order.

decision.NOTE: Dependency list created, continue to next validation
Review priority created, continue to Phase 1

steps.name: Phase 1: First Pass Property Identification
steps.description: Perform line-by-line review and identify all properties
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/properties-phase-1.md. Run exclusively the properties-phase-1 agent using the Task tool. This phase will perform a full line-by-line review of all functions and contracts, writing down all identified properties in magic/properties-first-pass.md.

decision.NOTE: First pass properties created, continue to Phase 2

steps.name: Phase 2: Property Review and Filtering
steps.description: Review properties and filter out invalid, vacuous, or obvious ones
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/properties-phase-2.md. Run exclusively the properties-phase-2 agent using the Task tool. This phase will review the first pass properties, discard invalid/vacuous/obvious properties to magic/discarded-properties.md, and create the refined magic/properties-second-pass.md.

decision.NOTE: Second pass properties created, continue to Setup check

steps.name: Check Recon Setup Exists
steps.description: Check if recon/Setup.sol exists before proceeding to property implementation

decision.NOTE: Recon Setup found, continue to Phase 3 implementation
Recon Setup not found - run recon-generate first to create scaffolding

steps.name: Phase 3: Property Implementation
steps.description: Implement the refined properties as invariant tests
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/properties-phase-3.md. Run exclusively the properties-phase-3 agent using the Task tool. This phase will implement the properties from magic/properties-second-pass.md as actual invariant tests.
